title: argostemma laeve subsp. laeve
intro: Argostemma laeve subsp. laeve, also known as the smooth argostemma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Argostemma laeve subsp. laeve include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent to soothe skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in the form of a tincture or dried extract for its medicinal properties.
